NÚMEROS: Não especificados

 

VISUAL: Framework apresentado com as letras C-T-L-S-T destacadas, estrutura de processo de análise de trading

 

[07:05] "So, um, and you guys can see this the notes, right? Right here. Or should I make this bigger? Okay, so let me just Okay. And I I'll just make this really wide. All right. [07:30] "Um really really you should be able to just take trades and make money. Be calm and know that the strategy and process works. [08:00] "Because the reason why people can make so much money in trading or investing is because you're not leveraging your time or energy or skills anymore, which are all things that have caps upon them. Um, you can only work so many hours in a day. you can only have so many people run through your system until you grow the system. You can only serve so many clients until you need to grow your client base or charge more or whatever it is."

 

[08:25] "Whereas in investing and trading, you're literally just leveraging your money. Um, and that's the highest level level of leverage you can have when it comes to making money. Even if you listen to Elon Musk talk or Jeff Bezos talk or Warren Buffett talk, what do they always talk about? They talk about capital allocation, right? That is the greatest skill set on earth because if you know how to allocate capital effectively, you know where to put your money to grow it."

 

[08:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "C - CATALYST"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados

 

VISUAL: Primeira letra do framework destacada, explicação de catalisadores de mercado

 

[09:00] "So first things first, C stands for catalyst. Okay, this is actually the biggest mover in any instrument whether it's a stock, crypto, whatever it is, is catalyst. And there's a reason why. Okay, so in the crypto world, it has a lot to do with uh things like gas fees, things like being able to uh have enough nodes on a network, things like how many transactions per second can you do, the speed of the network, um and then the applications of how the the blockchain works."

 

[09:30] "So for example, why is Bitcoin valuable? Actually, if you look into it, if some of you crypto geeks, Bitcoin is not the best network to actually transact billions of transactions on every single day. It wouldn't work for for me to go buy a freaking coffee at Starbucks, it would take 45 minutes for the transaction to actually go through. That's why technologies like ETH and Salana and things like that are being built because it's faster."

 

[10:00] "Okay, so Catalyst is the one of those things where it's like when you hear um about uh you know these Salana NFTs blowing up. Well, that's a that's a trigger for you to know, okay, maybe Salana is a good buy because there's an entire network of developers building technology on top of Salana. Okay, so these are the kind of things."

 

[10:25] "For example, Bitcoin recently dropped down to like 41K or something like that. A lot of people are freaking out thinking the the bull market's over, which it could be. [11:15] "When the uh when interest rates go up, people want to move their money out of growth and they want to put it into dividends. They want to put it into bonds because that means the yield on their money is going to be higher. Okay? So, that's what's happening. People are moving their money out of things that grow and they're going to put it into things that can produce them a return on their money, right?"

 

[11:40] "Because a lot of if you look at any of the biggest players um in terms of wealth, they actually make the majority of their money through loaning, right? [20:15] "Uh again, a moving average is just like what you learned in arithmetic in in middle school or high school. It's just a line plotting the data of the last 50 uh price candles. Okay? So, if the last 50 times of price went from like $50 to $100, it's a line that's just plotting that data. Okay? And that's how you can establish trend very easily."

[26:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "L - LEVELS (Support & Resistance)"

 

NÚMEROS: $69K (Bitcoin resistance), $29.5K (Bitcoin support), $35K (entry example)

 

VISUAL: Conceito de suporte e resistência explicado visualmente, níveis chave marcados em gráfico

 

[26:10] "So that's the next thing catalyst. Okay. Uh and then trend after trend is levels. Okay. Now all levels are are they're basically areas of support and resistance. Okay. So let's go over to BTC. Um, and you guys will see this real quick. Let's just go to BDCUSD. Um, so clearly, right, and right now I just have my levels mapped out. Clearly this 69K level is a resistance. It's a key resistance."

 

[26:40] "Okay, all that means is very simple is supports are levels where buyers, institutional buyers, people with actual money, not us, okay, billionaires, they're going, 'Oh, this is a good time to buy.' Okay? And resistance is where they're saying, 'Hey, this is where I'm going to sell because I want to lock in my profit.'"

 

[27:05] "Because one of the biggest things that I think a lot of people who have money and try to deploy money get screwed up with is they make a ton of money, but they don't pull their profits. And that's another really stupid thing to do is you're making a ton of money and then you're like, 'Oh, I'm just going to let it ride and then it comes back down on you and then you sell at the wrong time.' Right? That's one of the worst things you can do. Understand where your support and resistance levels are."

 

[27:35] "Again, it's super easy to tell on a chart. Like for example, right over here where we had a bounce on spy on July 2021. You guys can see that, right? Is this a support or a resistance? It's okay. No wrong answers." "Support." "Yeah. Yeah, you're right. Support, right? That's where buyers are. Buyers are sitting, right? And so basically the 29.5K level for Bitcoin on the week on the weekly, which is a big deal. That's a very strong level for BTC."

 

[28:05] "So when if BTC comes back down there, should you be probably buying?" "Yeah." "Right. And when Bitcoin goes back to 69K and your grandma's like, 'Yo, I want to buy some Bitcoin.' Should you be buying?" "Absolutely fucking not. You should be selling."

 

[28:25] "Okay. And so like these are the few pieces of knowledge that if you know and truly just internalize this stuff, it's very easy. Like the technical analysis is super easy. Jeremy always talks about this is having a datadriven perspective. So this is the data right in front of you. Okay? You don't buy at a top, you sell at a top. Okay? And when you're coming off of a bounce, that's when you buy."

 

[29:00] "Uh and again, I'm just using these terms because in the crypto world, can't really short too well unless you use an exchange. Um so I know most of you guys are just buying for the value to go up. So I'll just use those terms for now. So um that's level, support and resistance. Okay."

 

[29:20] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "S - SIGNAL (Entry Triggers)"

 

NÚMEROS: $35K-40K (Bitcoin entry example), 30-40K profit in weeks

 

VISUAL: Sinal de compra destacado em gráfico, bounce de suporte como trigger de entrada

 

[29:25] "The next thing is signal. All right. Um, a signal is basically like a buying trigger. Okay? And I'll show you guys an algorithm that I coded out. It's pretty simple. I'll walk you through the theory of of how it works. Um, is a signal is a trigger for when you should buy. The the greatest thing I did in my trading that made me very very profitable and very consistent, 80 to 90% of my trades are green, is because I never buy or sell unless there's a signal in the market to tell me to do so."

 

[30:00] "I'm not just fucking going, 'Oh, I'm gonna like buy this, buy that.' that I actually don't even I mean you guys can DCA if you want but if you know what you're doing honestly DCAing is a pretty rudimentary strategy. Um you want to have a signal. Okay, so I'll show you what a signal is like. Um one of the one of the best signals that you have is a bounce off a key support. Right?"

So basically what you got to realize is what moves markets. You do not move a market. I don't move a market."

 

[33:35] "For you to move any of these markets that's above a few hundred million market cap, for you to move any market, even a dollar, you're going to have to invest tens of millions of dollars into that equity. [34:00] "So, you got to look at the market more as like a wave as as an ocean and you're a surfer. Okay? You want to surf the wave, get in when when the time is right, when the wave is building, you want to get on, you want to ride that wave, and then get off when the wave's over, right? And obviously, if any of you have tried to surf or anything before, if you try to catch the wave when it's already moving, you're going to get fucking clobbered, right?"

 

[34:30] "So, it's the same thing. So, tape and order flow is just understanding. Um, you can see these on on different platforms like if you use Binance or if you use FTX or any of the different platforms that you trade on, you'll actually see something called level two. Um, and you'll also see the live orders. Basically, you want to watch those orders to see if people are uh buying and selling at a high volume. And you want to see if big money is coming into the market."

 

[35:00] "Again, this is something that I don't I I think you're going to have to learn on your own because it's not something I can teach you just by showing you. NÚMEROS: 10K-20K+ monthly minimum recommended

 

VISUAL: Prioridade #1 destacada - negócios e renda ativa antes de trading/investing

 

[01:00:05] "Um because you know again we Bitcoin works in cycles. There's bull markets there's bare markets. [01:29:20] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Lesson #6: Take Initial Out - Play with House Money"

 

NÚMEROS: Top 25 crypto: sell initial at 50% up, High risk/NFTs/micro caps: sell initial at 2x

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de risk management: recuperar investimento inicial e deixar lucro correr

 

[01:29:25] "Number six, take initial out. Play with house money. You can't lose. Mitigate your risk. Okay. Investing is all about mitigating risk. Um, this is my rule of thumb. If it's a top 25 crypto, once I'm up 50%, I sell my initial. Okay? Because these things move way too slow. Okay? If it's something like high risk NFTts, micro caps, I sell when I 2x. Okay? Sell my initial. Let the rest ride and then it's your job to deter micro cap."

 

[01:30:00] "Micro cap. at 2x and they 2x pretty routinely. Yeah, they they move quick. For example, we recently bought Synapse. It 2x on us in two weeks. In two weeks, it doubled. We pulled our our principle out and we're now letting the rest ride. So, it's a free position. Make sense? Same thing with FTM, right? We got in, it doubled. We pulled out our initial principle so we can utilize that capital for something else. Now, it's a free position. That money is free to us. Whether it goes all the way to the moon or it dies, it is what it is. Free."

 

[01:30:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Lesson #7: High-Level Indicators"

 

NÚMEROS: 20-week SMA, 21-week EMA (Bull Market Support Band)

 

VISUAL: Bull Market Support Band destacado como melhor indicador de curto prazo

 

[01:30:45] "Okay. And now, next, the most highle indicators. Okay. Again, you guys are high level people. Well, you guys need to focus on your fucking businesses. Like, we we really need to all be making at least 100K a month, you know, like at least in our pockets, right? So, this is that's the most important thing. How can we stay high level and still be, you know, um efficient in these markets, right?"

 

[01:31:15] "Two things. Number one, for the short term, the bull market support band, and number two, the rainbow chart. Okay, rainbow chart is really, really simple. Well, we'll start with the bull market support band. It's the 20week SMA and the 21-week EMA. Okay, so this has been back tested. This is probably the best indicator and just one, you know, short-term indicator that you could look at."

If you're buying micro caps, never buy when we're under the support band. Buy when Bitcoin is over the support band and holds that support band. Okay. The reason why is because micro caps, they move after Bitcoin. Bitcoin moves first. Micro caps move after."

 

[01:32:20] "So, you will have a few days to get into these things in a very risk uh averse scenario. Okay? 📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Trading Performance: 80-90% success rate com estratégia CTLST

Retornos Diários: 1-5K/dia consistentemente (Zan), objetivo de 100K/dia

Amigo: 100-500K/dia usando apenas estratégia 9/21 EMA

17-day Green Streak: 1-5K/day profit

Perda Única: $30K em um dia por questões psicológicas ao escalar para $50K

Tamanho Atual de Conta: $25K (Zan)

NFTs: $400K+ investidos, $100K+ em renda passiva

Neotokyo: $150K+ investido no último mês, $200/day passive income

NBA YC NFT: $700 (10 NFTs @ 0.015 ETH) → $10K+ (vendidos em ~1 ETH cada)

Outro NFT: 1 ETH mint → 15 ETH valor atual

Avalanche Trade: Entrada $30 → Saída $120 (pico $140)

Bitcoin: Average cost $18K (comprando abaixo de $10K)

Ethereum: Average cost $1,000 (comprando abaixo de $500)

Amigo que 1000x: $20K → Multi-millions em 2021

Synapse/FTM: 2x em 2 semanas

Client Success: $2.5M/month revenue para cliente

SPY Example: $237 (March 2020) → $468 (atual) = 100% gain em 2 anos

Alex Becker Mastermind: $25K investment

Hustleedia Discord: $100/month

Bull Market Timeline: 1-3 meses restantes (máximo 6 meses)

Next Cycle Target: Bitcoin $20K-40K

365 Days Rule: Melhor compra 365 dias após pico do ciclo

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

 

CTLST Framework:

C - Catalyst: Notícias, eventos, desenvolvimentos (Fed, regulações, adoção governamental)

T - Trend: Moving averages (50 WMA, 100 WMA, 200 WMA) para identificar uptrend/downtrend

L - Levels: Support & Resistance (comprar suporte, vender resistência)

S - Signal: Triggers de entrada (bounce de suporte, 9/21 EMA cross)

T - Tape: Order flow/volume institucional (Level 2 data)

 

9/21 EMA Cross Strategy:

9 EMA cruzando acima de 21 EMA = sinal de compra

9 EMA cruzando abaixo de 21 EMA = sinal de venda

Verificar com TTM Squeeze (light blue = bullish momentum, red = bearish)

85-90% success rate quando seguido sem emoção

Funciona em qualquer timeframe (4h, 1d, 1w)

 

Risk Management:

Top 25 cryptos: vender inicial em 50% de lucro

High risk/NFTs/micro caps: vender inicial em 2x

Deixar resto como "house money" (free position)

Nunca usar margin, apenas cash

Começar com $1K para aprender

Esperar consistência antes de escalar

Acostumar psicologicamente com tamanho antes de aumentar

 

NFT Strategy:

Mint NFTs (0.01-0.05 ETH) antes de irem para secondary market

Típico: 2-5x imediato, 10-20x em dias

Usar Discords pagos para alpha (Hustleedia $100/month)

Whitelist = mint preço baixo

Vet projects via Discord AMAs

Contratar VA para sintetizar informação de múltiplos Discords

Vender metade quando recuperar investimento inicial

 

Macro Strategy:

Bull Market Support Band (20-week SMA + 21-week EMA)

Nunca comprar micro caps quando BTC está abaixo da banda

Esperar BTC reverter e segurar banda antes de comprar shitcoins

Rainbow Chart para visão de longo prazo

Preparar cash para bear market (365 dias após pico)

Maior dinheiro é feito comprando no bear market

 

ESTRUTURA:

 

10 Lições Principais (Husten):

Business/Passive Income primeiro (mínimo 10-20K/month)

Connections & Education (full-time crypto people, insider knowledge)

Don't be a Maxi (mente aberta, não Bitcoin/ETH maximalist)

Prep for Next Cycle (4-year cycles, comprar 365 dias após pico)

Most Money in Bear Market (preparar cash e mindset)

Take Initial Out (play with house money, mitigar risco)

High-Level Indicators (Bull Market Support Band, Rainbow Chart)

Where Action Happens (Twitter = high-level, Discord = nitty-gritty)

Premium Masterminds (Neotokyo, Alpha Gems)

Shitcoins Strategy (só comprar quando BTC acima support band)

 

Recursos de Educação:

Twitter: Seguir Husten, Becker, pessoas que eles seguem

YouTube: Leo Trades, ZSS Becker, CryptoBanter, Hustleedia (assistir 2x)

Podcast: All-In (4 billionaires, assistir 1.5x)

Discord: Hustleedia ($100/month), Neotokyo ($150K+ entry), Alpha Gems

News: Benzinga Pro (para stocks)

Platform: Trading View (grátis, adicionar indicadores)

 

Ciclos de Mercado:

4 anos de ciclo historicamente

Bull markets possivelmente "lengthening"

Último pico: Dec 2017/Jan 2018

4 anos = Dec 2021/Jan 2022

Extensão = 1-6 meses adicionais

Bear market drops: 60-90% típico

Acumulação em bear market = maiores retornos

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

 

Retornos Documentados:

Options: 20%+ em segundos possível

100x leverage em options

Crypto: 10-100x em micro caps (timing correto)

NFTs: 10-100x mais consistente que shitcoins

Bitcoin: $10K → $60K (6x em bull run)

ETH: $500 → $4K+ (8x+)

Luna: $42 → $78 (85%+ gain)

Passive Income: $200/day de Neotokyo NFTs

Friend: $20K → Multi-millions (50-100x+ em 1 ano)

Another Friend: $20K → 4M em single trade

 

Custos:

Bulletproof Program: ~$5K

8-Week Trading Class: TBD (similar a Jeremy's IMM)

Hustleedia Discord: $100/month

Neotokyo Entry: $150K+ (NFT purchase)

Alex Becker Mastermind: $25K

Trading View: Free (basic)

 

Risk/Reward:

High active income = better psychology = better trading

Não viver do trading money

Focus em business primeiro

Trading para compound wealth, não substituir income

Pode perder tudo se não gerenciar emoções

Paper trading não replica pressão psicológica real

Esperar 4-5 contas "blown" antes de consistência

 

Web 3 Opportunity:

Comparável a dot-com bubble late 90s

Gaming crypto = aplicação imediata

Esports > Athletes em 10 anos

99% dos projetos não sobreviverão

Early movers terão vantagem massiva

Roadmap + Marketing = funding

Criar próprio crypto project = potencial billionaire path

 

 

DURAÇÃO: ~1h 55minFORMATO: Masterclass/Workshop - Trading & Crypto Education
